positive: Symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of a mystical nocturnal forest canopy intersecting with celestial elements. The main subject features bioluminescent, stylized flora—large, glowing ferns, geometric mushrooms, and winding vines—intertwined with faint, milky nebula patterns and crescent moon silhouettes. Use a deep midnight blue and indigo color palette contrasted sharply with vibrant teal, electric cyan, and luminous violet accents. The composition must be centralized and contain strong, crisp outlines and graphic weight, designed for high-contrast textile printing. Style is a fusion of detailed neo-illustrative art and clean, vector-based graphic design. Perfect silhouette quality, minimal gradient work, maximum visual impact, suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, poorly drawn, artifacts, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, noise, overexposed, dirty background
